issues.description: Missing second effect entirely. Card has two abilities: [On Play] and [On Your Opponent's Attack]. DSL only contains the first effect and implements it incorrectly.

[On Play] effect is incomplete. Should include: look at 5 cards, reveal up to 1 {Supernovas} card, add to hand, then place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only has generic SearchDeck with no filter specification or deck ordering logic.
Missing [On Your Opponent's Attack] effect entirely: trash this Character to set up to 1 DON!! as active. This is a significant game mechanic and must be included.
Filter should specify {Supernovas} type, not {Any}. Should be type-based filter.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Supernovas} type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
[On Your Opponent's Attack] You may trash this Character: Set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active.
